title: YouTubeTweaks
description: YouTubeTweaks is an elite, minimalist browser extension designed to transform your YouTube experience into a high-performance productivity workspace. It combines native-feeling keyboard shortcuts with advanced layout optimizations and a professional-grade Cinematic Mode.

title: Gemini Logo Animation
description: A web-based recreation of the Gemini generative identity. This project showcases fluid motion design, advanced SVG/CSS filtering, and adaptive performance rendering.

title: Ada Technical Institute
description: A responsive school platform built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to manage news updates and event galleries. It features a PHP and MySQL backend to handle departmental information, academic resources, and public staff directories for students and parents

title: Nextgen CFO
description: A modern CFO website, built with React and a modern UI library to provide key insights.

title: SkyGlow Construction
description: A professional website for a construction company, showcasing their portfolio and services.

title: Logi Transport Hub
description: A logistics and transportation management system for tracking shipments and managing fleets.

title: Feedback Hub 360
description: A comprehensive feedback management system built with React, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL with Prisma ORM for organizational feedback collection and analysis.

title: Sales & Inventory Management
description: A lightweight, offline desktop application designed for seamless small-scale stock management. Built with Python and Tkinter, it automates sales processing and PDF invoice generation while leveraging Excel for flexible data portability. Key features include real-time stock validation and a dedicated module for tracking customer debt.

title: JAKE Retro Download Manager
description: A desktop application built with Python for managing and accelerating file downloads with a retro UI.
